scripts.build:backend: npm run build:aggregator && npm run build:api && npm run build:sdk
scripts.test:backend: npm run test:aggregator && npm run test:api && npm run test:sdk
scripts.install:all: cd services/aggregator && npm install && cd ../../api && npm install && cd ../sdk && npm install
scripts.generate:api-client: npm run generate:openapi && npm run generate:client
